mongoMissing: MONGODB_URI is not configured. Set it in .env before running `audithex history`.

flags.limit: Maximum number of rows to print (default: 20)
flags.skip: Number of rows to skip — use for paging (default: 0)
flags.rootPath: Only show scans whose rootPath matches this value exactly
flags.show: Print the full record for one scan run by its id
flags.json: Emit JSON instead of the table
